tasks.title: Build: multi-dim jailbreak erasure at L* (PCA top-5 directions) — Q219 1D insufficient
tasks.definition_of_done: PCA-5 erasure script; compare AUROC to 1D CAA; measure AND-frac delta; CPU <5min

tasks.title: Experiment: Whisper decoder AND-frac — find decoder L* for content sensitivity (extends Q220)
tasks.definition_of_done: AND-frac curves per decoder layer; identify decoder L*; compare to encoder L*/D=0.50; sensitivity vs neutral content delta

tasks.title: Build: L*-Only LoRA mock — efficient fine-tuning targeting commit layer only vs full-layer LoRA
tasks.definition_of_done: LoRA adapters at L* only; compare AND-frac preservation and WER improvement to full-layer; CPU mock

tasks.title: Design: MATS proposal section — commit hijacking as audio safety threat taxonomy
tasks.definition_of_done: Formal description of commit-hijacking mechanism; 3 attack types; proposed interventions; 300-word section

tasks.title: Build: AND-frac curriculum learning scheduler — high AND-frac=easy, low=hard; WER comparison mock
tasks.definition_of_done: Sample difficulty scored by AND-frac at L*; curriculum vs random training order WER mock

tasks.title: Build: AND-frac in ViT-B/16 mock — test L*/D universality for vision transformers
tasks.definition_of_done: AND-frac on mock ViT activations; L*/D ratio; compare to GPT-2/Whisper/CodeParrot table

tasks.title: Build: AND-frac transfer attack — L* steering vector from GPT-2 to perturb Whisper encoder (cross-model)
tasks.definition_of_done: Cross-model steering script; cosine similarity of L* vectors; WER degradation measured; CPU mock

tasks.title: Write: paper section on commit hijacking — mechanistic safety connection between AND-frac and jailbreaks
tasks.definition_of_done: 300-word section; cites Q219 CAA finding; formalizes hijacking = increased AND-frac alignment; placement in T3 paper

tasks.title: Experiment: decoder-layer sensitivity probe — cross-attention AND-frac for sensitive vs neutral Whisper decoder
tasks.definition_of_done: Run real Whisper-base; compute AND-frac on decoder cross-attention at each layer; topic sensitivity delta

tasks.title: Build: AND-frac privacy filter — suppress commit signal at L* for PII tokens in Whisper decoder
